results.title: AI Agents Course
results.summary: A free Hugging Face course from beginner to expert on understanding, using, and building AI agents.

results.title: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)
results.summary: A DeepLearning.AI course on designing, building, deploying, and evaluating production-ready RAG applications.

results.title: AI Agents for Image and Video Generation
results.summary: A DeepLearning.AI course on building media agents that generate, evaluate, and iterate on image and video outputs.

results.title: Generative AI for Everyone
results.summary: A DeepLearning.AI course by Andrew Ng about how generative AI works, what it can do, and how to use it in work and business.

results.title: Get Started with AI Applications and Agents on Azure
results.summary: A Microsoft Learn path on building generative AI applications and agents on Azure.

results.title: AI Strategy for Business Leaders
results.summary: A Harvard Division of Continuing Education program on aligning AI with business strategy and leading AI transformation.

results.title: Operationalizing No-Code AI with Zapier
results.summary: A Coursera course on designing, building, optimizing, and scaling no-code AI workflows with Zapier.
